---
title: "Customer Analytics & Targeting – Intuit QuickBooks"
description: "Predictive customer targeting model using logistic regression and random forest to optimize outreach, achieving 0.82 AUC and 18% uplift in conversion rate"
categories: [Python, Machine Learning, Customer Analytics, Regression]
date: "2026-02-01"
image: "../../files/intuit_thumb.png"
---

## Overview

Built a predictive customer targeting model for **Intuit QuickBooks** to optimize marketing outreach strategy. The goal was to identify which customers were most likely to convert, enabling smarter spend allocation and higher ROI on campaigns.

## Problem Statement

With a large customer base and limited marketing budget, Intuit needed to move beyond broad-reach outreach and instead **target the right customers at the right time** — those with a genuine propensity to convert.

## Approach

- Developed and compared **Logistic Regression** and **Random Forest** classification models
- Engineered features from customer behavioral, demographic, and engagement data
- Used **uplift modeling** techniques to isolate the causal impact of outreach, not just correlation
- Evaluated models with AUC-ROC, precision-recall curves, and incremental lift metrics

## Results

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| AUC-ROC | **0.82** |
| Precision | **76%** |
| Conversion Rate Uplift | **+18%** |
| Projected Incremental Profit | **$410K** |

## Key Contributions

- Framed the business question as an **uplift/incremental modeling** problem rather than pure classification
- Identified the top decile of customers driving the majority of incremental conversions
- Delivered actionable targeting segments with clear business interpretation for marketing teams

## Tech Stack

`Python` · `Scikit-learn` · `Pandas` · `NumPy` · `Logistic Regression` · `Random Forest` · `Uplift Modeling`
